what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG clipboard icon with an outlined clipboard body, top clip, and three horizontal list lines.
observations: Root svg uses viewBox="0 0 24 24" with width and height set to 24.
Icon is stroke-based with fill="none", stroke="currentColor", stroke-width="1.5", rounded line caps, and rounded joins.
The clipboard body and clip are drawn with rounded rectangles.
The list content is drawn as one path containing three horizontal segments.
standouts: Uses currentColor so the icon inherits text or parent color.
Compact single-element SVG suitable for an icon asset.
The glyph reads as a clipboard with checklist-style text lines.
conventions: Follows common outline icon conventions: 24px canvas, no fill, rounded strokes, currentColor stroke.
Keeps geometry inline with basic SVG primitives rather than external references.
Uses a single path for repeated interior line marks.
concerns: No title, desc, role, or aria attributes are embedded; accessibility semantics must come from the consumer if needed.
notes: A reusable outline clipboard icon asset drawn directly in SVG primitives.
questions: Should this icon be treated as decorative or given an accessible label by consumers?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename implies a clipboard icon, and the SVG content draws a clipboard with list lines.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable, themeable clipboard icon for UI surfaces.
contribution: Contributes a small currentColor clipboard/list glyph that can be retained as a reusable icon substrate in a fused design system.
summary_for_embedding: A 24x24 currentColor outline SVG icon depicting a clipboard with a top clip and three list lines.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for supplying a reusable clipboard icon asset that can inherit UI color styling.
